sentences.text: Thank you for calling Apex apartments, we value your time and will be with you promptly this call may be recorded for quality assurance and training purposes. If you are interested in learning more about renting one of our beautiful homes press one. If you are a resident with a maintenance emergency press two. If you're a resident and need to place a routine maintenance request press three, if you are a vendor or have a question for the office staff press four. Thank you for calling Apex apartments. If you know, your party's extension you may dial it at anytime during this message or remain on the line for the next available staff member. Please wait while I transfer your call. We are working rapidly to ensure your whole time with us will be as brief as possible your patients appreciated. Thank you for calling Apex apartment the values of time and will be with you company. Please call me recorded for quality assurance and training purposes.
